ddls:
CREATE TABLE "court_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the court location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the court location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the court location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the court location */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the court location */,
  "court_type" TEXT /* Type of court (e.g., district, appeals, supreme) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_numbers" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case number */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court location where the case was heard */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Number assigned to the case */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of case (e.g., civil, criminal) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the case was heard */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases for the year */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_numbers_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_numbers_case_type FOREIGN KEY ("case_type") REFERENCES case_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_numbers_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES court_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the case type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the case was heard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case file */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the case file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the case file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., pdf, docx) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_files_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_numbers ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., court administrator, judge, law enforcement) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_numbers ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case outcome */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the case (e.g., guilty, not guilty) */,
  "sentence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sentence in months */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fine in dollars */,
  "court_costs" REAL /* Amount of court costs in dollars */,
  "probation_period" INTEGER /* Length of the probation period in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_outcomes_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_numbers ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the participant belongs to */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "participant_type" TEXT /* Type of participant (e.g., defendant, plaintiff) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_participants_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_numbers ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_numbers ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the status update belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the case */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_status_history_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_numbers ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hearings" (
  "hearing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hearing */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the hearing belongs to */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date of the hearing */,
  "hearing_time" TEXT /* Time of the hearing */,
  "hearing_type" TEXT /* Type of hearing (e.g., pre-trial, trial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hearing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hearings_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_numbers ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "judge_email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being assigned */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the case was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_assignments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_numbers ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_assignments_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courthouse_security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security measure */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the courthouse location */,
  "security_measure" TEXT /* Description of the security measure */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Level of security (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courthouse_security_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES court_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "administrator_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "administrator_email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id")
)
